scripts.format: prettier --write package.json wrangler.jsonc tsconfig.json vitest.config.ts .oxlintrc.json worker tests-worker docs/assets/javascripts
scripts.format:check: prettier --check package.json wrangler.jsonc tsconfig.json vitest.config.ts .oxlintrc.json worker tests-worker docs/assets/javascripts
scripts.lint:worker: oxlint --tsconfig tsconfig.json --type-aware --type-check --deny-warnings --report-unused-disable-directives worker && oxlint --tsconfig tsconfig.tests.json --type-aware --type-check --deny-warnings --report-unused-disable-directives tests-worker vitest.config.ts
scripts.validate:worker: npm run format:check && npm run lint:worker && npm run typecheck:worker && npm run test:worker && npm run worker:types:check && npm run worker:dry-run && npm run worker:dry-run:preview && npm run worker:dry-run:production
